plating.title: Electroplating Thickness Rules
plating.desc: Define which items use 8um plating (default 5um). Rules apply when generating the sequences file.
plating.hint: Rule logic: if an item's Summary or Item No. contains the keyword, its electroplating (贝维特/佰润/欣捷) uses the target thickness. Any matching rule applies. e.g. Summary contains S021 → 8um.
plating.empty: No rules yet (all items default to 5um)

upload.title: Upload BOM Base
upload.canTemplateDesc: Upload Excel file with can template mapping (optional, for auto-matching)
upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop file here, or click to select

filter.title: Filter Items
filter.desc: Select items from the base file to build BOM
filter.helpBody:
• One item no. can map to multiple chip components (Component / WAF), and the same component may carry different replacement structures.
• Each row is keyed by item no. + component + replacement structure, so the same item no. may appear several times — each row is a distinct combination.
• Every selected row is carried independently into BOM generation and is never merged.

config.title: Configure Cans
config.desc: Assign welding, molding, and packaging cans for selected items

rules.title: Can Matching Rules
rules.weldInfo: Welding can: auto-matched by function + mil (from alt structure), no setup needed
rules.pack: Packaging can (general; pick by rule when multiple)
rules.regexTip: Regular expression: _R[12]_ matches R1 or R2; ^MB matches starts-with MB

exportList.title: Generate C-CMAX Import List
exportList.desc: Confirm configuration and generate C-CMAX import list

generate.title: Generate ERP Upload Files
generate.desc: Upload standard operations file, combine with import list to auto-generate 3 ERP upload files
generate.hintDesc: Upload "WXBMR004_Standard Operations.xlsx" on the right. Do not upload other files.
generate.stdOpsDesc: Upload WXBMR004 standard operations Excel file

toast.invalidFormat: Invalid file format. Please upload an .xlsx or .xls Excel file.
toast.uploadFailed: Upload failed. Please check the file format or make sure you uploaded the correct file.

history.title: History
history.desc: View all generation tasks and upload records
history.deleteConfirmMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this task? All associated files will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
